description.value: Whether working vast ale vats or overseeing robotics factories, your clan has long honed its trade through technology. You gain the @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feats.Item.Additional Lore] feat for your clan's primary industry (such as Warfare Lore). When you @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.Craft] a common item of your level or lower that's associated with this industry, you automatically know the formula and can use the Lore skill in place of Crafting. Your proficiency in this Lore makes you eligible for Crafting skill feat prerequisites, but only while you're interacting with items related to your clan's industry.
